{{CargoRelic
|name=Human World CD
|class_id=20310
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This is a CD-ROM aboard Voyager 1. It recorded the sounds and images of various cultures and life on Earth to be discovered by extraterrestrial intelligence. In a sense, this is just a sign that maybe we're destined to be alone in this universe!
|fame=16
|art=12
|fth=18
|civ=15
|tech=29
|ss1=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Relic Points: 2000/2000
|ss2=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Relic Points: 4000/4000
|ss3=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Relic Points: 6000/6000
|ss4=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Relic Points: 6000/6000
|ss7=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Relic Points: 6000/6000<br> (Awakened)
}}
